---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
mtcars %>% select(mpg, disp, wt) %>% cor() %>% round(2)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
levels(penguins$island)
```

```{r}
nc = length(levels(penguins$island)) - 1
contrasts(penguins$island) = contr_banova(nc + 1)
contrasts(penguins$island)
X = model.matrix(~ flipper_len + island, data = na.omit(penguins))
head(X)
colMeans(X)
```
```{r}
x_names = parse_formula(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + island)$fixed_main
is_factor = rep(FALSE, times = length(x_names))
for(i in 1:length(x_names)){
  is_factor[i] = is.factor(penguins[, x_names[i]]) | is.character(penguins[, x_names[i]])
}
is_factor
```


```{r}
prep = data.frame(y = c(-2, 9, 1, 8, -3, 1, 7),
                       x1 = factor(c("a", "b", "b", "a", "c", "a", "c")),
                       x2 = c(1, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0, 2),
                       x = c(-1.4, 0.1, 0.8, -0.9, 0.5, -2.4, 12.0)) %>%
  prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x)
  #prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x1:x2 + x2:x3)

X = model.matrix(y ~ x1 + x2 + x,
                 data = prep$data)
head(X)
```

```{r}
# initialize prior adjustment vector
prior_adjust = rep(1.0, times = ncol(X))
names(prior_adjust) = colnames(X)

# loop through numeric predictor variables and adjust the prior by their SDs
# this is equivalent to z-scoring the numeric predictors
for(i in 1:length(prep$x_numeric_names)){ 
  x_name = prep$x_numeric_names[i] # current numeric predictor variables
  has_x = grepl(x_name, colnames(X)) # Is the predictor part of each column in the design matrix?
  print(x_name)
  names(has_x) = colnames(X)
  print(has_x)
  print("")
  prior_adjust[has_x] = prior_adjust[has_x]/sd(X[,x_name]) # if so, adjust for that predictor's standard deviation
}

print(adjust)
```

```{r}
foo = parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2*x)
```

```{r}
foo
```



```{r}
fit = brm_indprior(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + bill_dep + island, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         seed = 1212)
```

```{r}
names(fit)
```

```{r}
#foo = bf(y ~ x1 + x2 + (1 + x1 | g1 + g2))
foo = y ~ x1*x2 + (x1 + x2 | g2) + (1 | g1)
#foo = y ~ x1*x2
bar = brmsterms(foo)
```

```{r}
sm = submodels(foo)
sm$formulas
```
```{r}
random_included = list()
random = parse_formula(foo)$random
if(is.null(random)){
  random_included = NULL
} else{
  group = names(random)
  for(j in 1:sm$n_models){
    rexpr = list()
    for(i in 1:length(group)){
      rterms = intersect(random[[i]], c(sm$included[[j]], "1"))
      rexpr[[i]] = paste0("(", paste(rterms, collapse = "+"), "|", group[[i]], ")")
    }
    random_included[[j]] = paste(rexpr, collapse = "+")
  }
}

random_included
```

```{r}
rterms = list()
paste0("(", paste(random_included[[1]]$g2, collapse = "+"), "|", group[[1]], ")")
```




```{r}
fit$stanvars$prior_adjust$sdata
```



```{r}
summary(fit)
```




```{r}
bar = brm(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + bill_dep + island, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         prior = set_prior("normal(0, sigma/sd_X)", class = "b"),
         stanvars = stanvar(c(sd(na.omit(penguins)$flipper_len), sd(na.omit(penguins)$bill_len), sd(na.omit(penguins)$bill_dep)), name = "sd_X", scode = "vector[Kc] sd_X;", block = "data"),
         refresh = 0,
         seed = 1212)

summary(bar)
```

```{r}
stancode(bar)
```


```{r}
barbar = update(bar,
                formula = body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len,
                stanvars = stanvar(c(sd(na.omit(penguins)$flipper_len), sd(na.omit(penguins)$bill_len)), name = "sd_X", block = "data"),
                recompile = FALSE)
summary(barbar)
```
```{r}
stancode(barbar)
```

```{r}
X = model.matrix(~ disp + wt - 1, data = mtcars) %>% scale(center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
N = nrow(X)
V = solve(t(X)%*%X/N)
V
```


```{r}
fit <- brm_jzs(mpg ~ disp + wt,
               #mpg ~ disp + wt + disp:wt, 
               data = mtcars, 
               family = gaussian(),
               #r = sqrt(2)/4,
               r = 1,
               iter = 10000,
               )
```

```{r}
result = inc_tests(fit)
print(result$inc_table)
```

```{r}
print(result$model_table)
```

```{r}
result_comp = generalTestBF(body_mass ~ bill_len*sex,
                            data = na.omit(penguins),
                            rscaleCont = 1)
print(result_comp/result_comp[4])
```
